name: Content Editor
description: Content creation and editing interface for publishing patterns, themes, blueprints, and other registry items.

page_briefs.content-new: Two-panel editing layout. Left panel has a structured form for content metadata (type selector, name, description, tags). Right panel shows a live JSON viewer with syntax highlighting that updates as the form changes.
page_briefs.content-edit: Same two-panel layout as new. Left form pre-populated with existing content data. Right panel shows the full JSON with diff indicators for changed fields.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area
